refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific sub-functions to address the distinct aspects of worksite mapping: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are critical for safety and operational effectiveness.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a comprehensive digital worksite model/map that includes terrain features, identified obstacles, and clearly marked work zones, validated against real site data.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and map obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite model.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm to generate the worksite model.
DP3: Develop a dynamic work-zone representation layer integrated with operational policies.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 + DP2 + DP3 combined to fulfill the comprehensive worksite mapping requirement.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
Integration of work-zone representation with terrain and obstacle data.
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically coupled but modular enough to allow clear interfaces and independent updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data (LIDAR, cameras).
Risk of data latency affecting real-time model accuracy.
High safety criticality demands rigorous validation of mapping accuracy.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design of data processing algorithms to isolate faults and facilitate updates.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing worksite analysis, and providing the worksite model to other modules.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, cameras) from Vehicle and other sources.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts related to detected obstacles and safety zones to Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module for worksite mapping; high containment of related functions with minimal diffusion.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not process mapping; low containment, high diffusion if assigned here.
Teleoperation consumes mapping data but does not generate it; poor containment.
Receives safety alerts but does not perform mapping; moderate diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module ensures high containment, reduces diffusion, and aligns with system ownership and safety criticality.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Interface latency between NGHE Solution and Vehicle for telemetry data.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution and consider sub-module decomposition if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched with selected DPs that logically fulfill each sub-function with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as worksite mapping is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
Interfaces are well defined and limited to known interfaces.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated NGHE Solution module outputs against real site data and safety requirements.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution IM with well-defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Plan for scalability of NGHE Solution module to handle increasing data volume.
Define detailed interface protocols for Telemetry and SafetyAlert to ensure timely data exchange.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the requirements with acceptable risk and architectural clarity. No further decomposition needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and map obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite model.

revise.why: Current artifacts satisfy the criteria; focus can shift to implementation and verification.

assumptions: Sensor data quality and availability are sufficient for accurate mapping.
Interfaces will be implemented as specified.
open_risks: Potential latency in telemetry data affecting real-time mapping accuracy.
Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from sensor fusion algorithms.
Verification results of worksite model accuracy and safety alert effectiveness.
